name: Bulk Buy Chicken Breast
description:
Chicken Breast 5kg (Approx 20 pcs) 200-240g each.
Make your meal planning easy and your money go further with our bulk packs of chicken breast fillets. Sourced from only carefully selected producers, these quality 100% chicken breast fillets are skinless, boneless and have no added water. Low in fat and high in protein, they are ideal for those who enjoy healthy eating whilst also making healthy savings.

name: Halal Lamb Chops 5kg
description: Our halal mutton/lamb chops are a delicious and tender cut of meat, perfect for grilling or roasting. Cut from the loin of the lamb, these front chops are lean and flavorful. They are best cooked quickly at a high heat to seal in their natural juices, resulting in a juicy and succulent chop. With a delicate, mild flavor and a tender texture, these lamb chops are sure to be a hit with the whole family. Simply season them with your favorite herbs and spices and cook to your desired level of doneness. Order today and enjoy the taste of these high-quality halal lamb chops!

name: Mutton Leg Meat
description: Our mutton leg meat diced is the perfect ingredient for a hearty and flavorful meal. Cut from the leg of the lamb, this meat is tender and succulent. It is perfect for stews, casseroles, and slow-cooked dishes, as it becomes more tender the longer it is cooked.

name: Mutton Meat Boneless
description:
Mutton Meat (Diced) BONELESS from Mutton Leg & Shoulder Cuts Only
Our mutton meat boneless diced is a delicious and convenient option for any home cook. Cut from the leg of the lamb, this meat is tender and flavorful. It is perfect for a variety of dishes, such as stews, roasts, and kebabs. The boneless cut makes it easy to dice and slice, so you can use it in any recipe. Simply add it to your favorite dish and let the rich, savory flavor of the mutton shine through. Order today and add this versatile meat to your culinary repertoire!

name: Mutton Mince Meat
description:
Mutton Minced Meat (25% Fat Only)
Our mutton mince meat is a delicious and versatile ingredient for any home cook. Made from the leanest cuts of mutton, this mince is perfect for a variety of dishes such as meatballs, burgers, and pasta sauces. Its finely ground texture makes it easy to mix and shape, so you can use it in a variety of recipes. Order today and experience the delicious taste of our high-quality mutton mince!

name: Mutton Meat Mixed With Chops
description: Our Mutton Meat Mixed with chops is a delicious and convenient choice for any meat lover. This package includes a variety of cuts, including tender chops that are perfect for grilling or roasting. The mixed meat is sourced from farms that adhere to the highest standards of quality and animal welfare, ensuring that you are getting the best possible product. Mutton has a rich, full flavor that pairs well with a variety of seasonings and marinades. Whether you’re looking for an easy dinner option or planning a special meal, this mutton mixed meat with chops is sure to be a hit. Order now and enjoy the taste and convenience of this high-quality meat.

name: Mutton Shoulder Meat
description: Our mutton shoulder meat diced is the perfect ingredient for a hearty and flavorful meal. Cut from the shoulder of the lamb, this meat is tender and succulent. It is perfect for stews, casseroles, and slow-cooked dishes, as it becomes more tender the longer it is cooked.

name: Fryer Chickens
description:
Fresh Halal Fryer Chicken 1.3kg
Get the best fryer chicken online at our store. Our fryer chickens are juicy, flavorful, and sustainably raised on small farms. Each bird is hand-selected and carefully prepared to ensure the best taste and texture. Perfect for a crowd or a simple and delicious meal. name: Chicken Breast Strips
description:
Chicken Breast Strips 3kg
Our fresh chicken breast strips are a convenient and flavorful option for any meal. Cut from the breast of the chicken, these strips are lean and packed with protein. They are perfect for grilling, frying, or baking, and can be added to a variety of dishes such as salads, sandwiches, and stir-fries. Their versatility and convenience make them a staple in any kitchen. Simply cook them to your desired level of doneness and enjoy their delicate, mild flavor. Order today and add our fresh chicken breast strips to your weekly menu!

name: Fresh Chicken Mid Wings Flat Wings
description:
Fresh Halal Chicken Mid-Wing- Flat Wings with Skin On
Our fresh chicken flat wings are the perfect addition to any meal! These juicy, tender wings are sourced from top-quality chicken and are sure to be a hit with all your friends and family. Each flat wing is carefully trimmed and perfectly seasoned, making them ready to grill, bake, or fry to perfection. Whether you’re hosting a barbecue or just looking for a tasty snack, these chicken flat wings are sure to hit the spot. So why wait? Add some of these delicious wings to your next order and experience the ultimate in flavor and convenience!
